achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Beginning Test

achievements.description: Complete the Beginning Test without getting hit

achievements.title: Sacred Woods
achievements.description: Beat the Sacred Woods
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: This Is My Forest Now
achievements.description: Beat the Forest Guardian without the Arrowhead item, using only the upper wooden planks without getting hit
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Arachnophobia
achievements.description: Complete the Spider Passage in Sacred Woods without getting hit and not using the Deerskin Shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Sacred Treasures
achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Sacred Woods
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.description: Complete the Ladder Passage in the Fire Test without getting hit and not using the Deerskin Shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: I Think My D-Pad Is Stuck
achievements.description: Beat the Fire Guardian without the Arrowhead item and only using downward strikes
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Ice Ritual
achievements.description: Beat the Ice Ritual
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Icebreaker
achievements.description: Defeat the Ice Guardian without using the Fire Wand or the Arrowhead item, and without having a potion stolen from you [One potion must remain after the battle]
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.description: Complete the Shaft in the Ice Test without getting hit and not using the Deerskin shirt item

achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Ice Test
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Secret Cliff
achievements.description: Beat the Secret Cliff
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Cannonball
achievements.description: Beat the Secret Guardian without the Arrowhead item and deal damage only when it has its sphere form
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Bomby Mood
achievements.description: Complete the Bomb Passage in Secret Cliffs without getting hit and not using the Deerskin Shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Cliff Treasures
achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Secret Cliff
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Magic Forest
achievements.description: Beat the Magic Forest
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Mothman
achievements.description: Beat the Magic Guardian without using the Fire Wand or the Arrowhead item, and without having a potion stolen from you [One potion must remain after the battle]
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Poison Soup
achievements.description: Complete the Poison Passage in the Magic Forest without getting hit and without using the Deerskin Shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Magic Treasures
achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Magic Forest
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Water Test
achievements.description: Beat the Water Test
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Frog Legs
achievements.description: Beat the Water Guardian without having any items or power ups  [no Arrowhead - Helmet - Spear Extension - Magic Potion]
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Don't Get Wet Feet
achievements.description: Complete the Slippery Passage in the Water Test without getting hit and not using the Deerskin Shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: Water Treasures
achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Water Test

achievements.title: The More Hearts You Have, the Easier It Gets, Right?
achievements.description: Beat the Final Guardian with all 12 hearts obtained

achievements.title: Bullseye
achievements.description: Beat the Final Guardian using only the Dart Totem [Downward and upward strikes are allowed]

achievements.title: Final Treasures
achievements.description: Reveal all hidden items in the Final Test
achievements.author: Schengo

achievements.title: One More Step
achievements.description: Complete the last passage before the Final Guardian without getting hit and not using the Deerskin shirt item
achievements.author: Schengo
